overall.description: A first-person walk through a cyberpunk city at night, starting at a neon-lit intersection and continuing along a covered pedestrian walkway with vibrant holographic advertisements and storefronts. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) featuring wet reflective streets and dense urban architecture.

events.description: camera tilts down from skyward view of towers to street level
crossing the wet street at a crosswalk with vehicles passing by

agents.ego_description: descending gaze from towering neon buildings and crossing the rain-slicked street at the crosswalk

car waiting at the traffic signal

futuristic glass and metal pedestrian walkway entrance
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a view looking up at towering skyscrapers covered in vibrant neon advertisements. The camera tilts down to street level and approaches a wet crosswalk. The ego crosses the rain-slicked asphalt as vehicles pass by, approaching the entrance to a covered glass walkway on the right.

slight right turn as the walkway curves gently

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered walkway with glass walls showing the street below

futuristic seating with glowing cyan accents
standing digital billboard displaying rotating advertisements

segments.scene_description: The ego enters a covered pedestrian walkway with a curved glass canopy overhead. The walkway features modern benches with neon accents and digital advertising kiosks. The glass walls reveal the street below while the path curves gently through the urban environment.

events.description: passing by pedestrians near a brightly lit storefront entrance
entering area dominated by intense pink and purple neon illumination

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway past various shops with Japanese signage and neon accents

notable_agents.action: person in red pants standing near a store entrance
group of people conversing near a pink-lit shop

entered.detail: rounded building facade with vertical magenta neon strips and Japanese characters
shop entrance with red neon sign indicating 24-hour operation
vertical light strips illuminating a central planter with trees

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues past a distinctive cylindrical building wrapped in pink neon lights. The ego passes by a 24-hour storefront with red signage and vertical purple light pillars. A few pedestrians stand near the shop entrances as the environment becomes more densely packed with neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: darker covered walkway transitioning to underpass

events.description: entering darker section with reduced ambient light and more prominent teal neon accents
approaching underpass entrance with green neon lighting and closed storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimmer section of the walkway toward a tunnel-like underpass

entered.detail: dark tunnel passage with green neon trim and overhead cover
massive vertical billboard displaying animated content
glowing safety railing along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a darker, more enclosed section of the walkway with teal accent lighting. The ego approaches an underpass entrance marked by green neon trim. A large vertical screen displays advertisements on the right while the path leads into a tunnel-like passage beneath the city structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, rain-slicked city intersection into the enclosed, neon-drenched depths of a pedestrian network. It begins by tilting down from towering skyscrapers to cross a wet asphalt street, moving steadily toward the entrance of a covered glass walkway. As the camera enters the canopy, the open city air shifts into a curated urban corridor featuring curved glass walls, neon-accented benches, and digital kiosks. The path then curves past a cylindrical building wrapped in pink light and a storefront with red signage and purple pillars, where the density of holographic advertisements increases. Finally, the environment transitions into a darker, more enclosed section with teal accent lighting before the camera passes a large vertical screen and enters a tunnel-like underpass marked by green neon trim.
